title: Nutty Silky Paneer Stir-fry
description: A cozy Egyptian dish featuring paneer, toasted nuts, and a touch of sweetness for a diabetic-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup paneer, cubed
ingredients.notes: Use low-fat or fat-free paneer if preferred.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons unsalted cashews, toasted and chopped
2 tablespoons honey or stevia, for sweetness

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat.
Add the paneer cubes and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes on each side.
Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same pan, add cashews and garlic. Sauté for about 1 minute or until fragrant.
Stir in mint leaves and continue cooking for another minute.
Pour in the lemon juice and honey (or stevia), mix well to combine.
Add cooked paneer cubes back into the pan and toss gently to coat evenly with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately as a dinner dish.
